title: Cursor Orchestrator
description: The flagship build: coordinating Cursor agents, repeatable delivery paths, and a nervous system for shipping complex software without losing intent.

title: Cursor Sync
description: The most useful project so far—settings and preferences that follow you across machines, already helping thousands of developers stay in flow.

title: Tangerina
description: A Discord bot built to bring fun and joy to servers—friendly automation that feels like part of the community, not another utilitarian bot.

title: Agentic Browser AI
description: An MCP server that made AI-driven browser interaction possible in the IDE—shipped before Cursor shipped native browser tools, when agents still needed a bridge to the live web.
